title: El último confín
overview: The Argentine Forensic Anthropology Team—created twenty years ago to investigate forced disappearances and clandestine burials—is working in the city of Córdoba, Argentina, where a mass grave containing the remains of more than 120 people has been discovered. "The Last Confine" is a documentary about the exhumation of this grave, about those working to identify those buried there, about the hopeful search by family members, and about the story of four of them who managed to recover the remains of their loved ones after twenty-seven years of waiting.
